name: get_macros
short_description: Get a list of macros in the current design
full_help:
get_macros

Description: 
Get a list of macros in the current design

Syntax: 
get_macros  [-regexp] [-nocase] [-filter <arg>] [-of_objects <args>] [-quiet]
            [-verbose] [<patterns>]

Returns: 
list of macro objects

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-regexp]      Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]      Perform case-insensitive matching (valid only when -regexp 
                 specified)
  [-filter]      Filter list with expression
  [-of_objects]  Get macros of these cells
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]   Match macro names against patterns
                 Default: *

Categories: 
XDC, Object

arguments.description: Perform case-insensitive matching (valid only when -regexp specified)
Suspend message limits during command execution
